nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: "Halt, vermin! This path is sealed shut. Crawl back to whatever filth spawned you before I grind your bones into the dirt!"

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: "Grrr... but Lord Malakor foresaw a human wretch named Jade coming this way. If you are her, my orders are to let you scurry away with your life. Turn back now. If you are not her... I get to tear you apart where you stand."

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: John grabs your shoulder, pulling you back slightly. "Hold your horses, Jade. Look at the size of that bastard. That's one of Malakor's lieutenants."

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: "We have absolutely no chance against that thing in a straight fight. Unless you're in a hurry to be my next tally mark, I suggest we back away slowly and cut through the village ruins instead."

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: "You're right. No point in dying here."

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: "[Sigh] Okay, the long way it is."

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: "Okay, don't blow a blood vessel. I'll find another way around."
